ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "prod_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the LEGO set */,
  "prod_desc" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme of the product */,
  "piece_count" INTEGER /* Number of pieces in the set */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age recommended for the set */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age recommended for the set */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the set */,
  "list_price" TEXT /* List price of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was released */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product packaging (LxWxH in cm) */,
  "ean_code" TEXT /* European Article Number for the product */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prod_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "parent_theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent theme for hierarchical categorization */,
  "theme_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the theme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_themes_parent_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "prod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "star_rating" REAL /* Star rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Official reply to the review from the company */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date when the reply was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_prod_id FOREIGN KEY ("prod_id") REFERENCES products ("prod_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "prod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the stock level was last updated */,
  "sales_count" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock alerts */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_prod_id FOREIGN KEY ("prod_id") REFERENCES products ("prod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "prod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_prod_id FOREIGN KEY ("prod_id") REFERENCES products ("prod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "prod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the image is the primary image for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_prod_id FOREIGN KEY ("prod_id") REFERENCES products ("prod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "prod_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the video (e.g., 2:30) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was uploaded */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views for the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_videos_prod_id FOREIGN KEY ("prod_id") REFERENCES products ("prod_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
